The '''Tactical Analysis Bureau''' was a branch of [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] responsible for analyzing data and compiling reports for senior personnel and government representatives regarding the tactical capabilities of pro-Imperial, neutral, or friendly forces.

Commodore [[Kursk Mal'ia]] was just one of multiple officers who was a part of this division.
